hooks.command: jq -n '{"hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "PostToolUse", "additionalContext": "Invoke /ora skill now — it contains the verification workflow. Do not plan without it."}}'

AGENT_TYPE=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_response.agentType // ""'); if [ "$AGENT_TYPE" = "ora:Hephaestus" ]; then jq -n '{"hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "PostToolUse", "additionalContext": "Hephaestus completed. Run ora:Aletheia verification before squash-merging this worktree."}}'; fi
